title: BlockFront Survival Patch
description: Datapack designed to enhance your BlockFront experience outside of custom games
body:
This datapack aims to restore and recreate many of [BlockFront](https://modrinth.com/mod/blockfront)’s functionalities and features, bringing them into your survival worlds and adding support for the mod even outside of custom matchmaking.

# Features
- Ammo indicator HUD
- Custom ammo system & ammo items
- Custom crafting method, including all weapons, vehicles, grenades & more
- Custom attachments system
- New ability to use syringes on yourself
- New ability to apply certain skins to guns and melees
- Recreated medic bags functionality
- Restored flamethrower tanks mechanic
- Restored weapon inspect mechanic
- Restored hitmarker and kill sound effects
- Locked offhand when holding a weapon

## Help
- **Crafting**: You will find three custom books in your recipe book. You can easily locate them by typing "Blueprint" in your search bar. These books (_Weapons Blueprint_, _Supplies Blueprint_ & _Vehicles Blueprint_) are used to craft everything in this datapack. (Crafting in creative mode doesn't require any materials).
- **Load ammo**: Hold an ammo item in your main hand and press the **F** key. Alternatively, you can drag the item into your off-hand slot.
- **Attachments**: Hold a compatible weapon (Guide included in the _Supplies Blueprint_), open your inventory and drag the attachment item onto your selected gun. To remove your attachments, use the same method, but with a wrench.
- **Syringes**: You can use adrenaline or medical syringes on yourself by holding down the shift key and right-clicking on your feet, while standing still.

_(Any bugs or missing features in *creative mode* may either be intentional or impossible to fix)_
- **Weapons from the creative menu won't have any of the datapack features**. This is intentional behavior. The datapack only affects crafted weapons to prevent messing with your existing worlds.
- **The attachments system doesn't work in creative mode**. Due to limitations of Minecraft datapacks, this cannot be fixed. To apply or remove an attachment, you must be in survival or adventure mode.

## Useful commands
- **HUD Toggle**:
  /scoreboard players set #hud bfusp_toggle {0/1}
- **Ammo**:
  /scoreboard players {add/remove/set} {player} bfusp_ammo_{type} {amount}
- **Blueprints**:
  /function bfusp:crafting/blueprint{1/2/3}
- **Joke weapons ingredient**:
  /function bfusp:crafting/permit
- **Randomize Mint**:
  /function bfusp:randomize_mint

## Requirements
The official [BlockFront](https://modrinth.com/mod/blockfront) mod is required to work.  
Latest tested version: 0.9.0.0b

## Special thanks to
[TNT1243](https://modrinth.com/user/TNT1243) (Original idea)  
[_vuis](https://modrinth.com/user/Vuis) (Some testing, help and ideas)  
\_JustaDude\_ [IGN] (Recipes and balancing suggestions)  

This datapack is not affiliated with the [BlockFront](https://modrinth.com/mod/blockfront) mod or its development team.
